steps.assistant_text: gl_func_0006BC44 = 1080-customized osContGetReadData (controller PIF read decode). Two-stage crack: (1) BOUNDARY FIX -- splat had carved the leading MAX_CONTROLLERS lui+lbu pair into a phantom 8-byte symbol (game_libs_func_0006BC44); merged it as the head, true span [0x6BC44..0x6BD14). (2) ido53-carve: IDO 5.3 -O1 with verbatim-libultra-style source. 1080 customizations vs libreultra: args (bitmask-out, 4-byte pad records), button stored byte-swapped via direct u8 fields (button_lo<<8)|button_hi (cast-based access emits pointer+offset instead of direct lbu N(sp)), ALL format fields u8 (stick load is lbu not lb), bound and PIF buffer as two distinct runtime-patched data placeholders (single shared placeholder makes IDO CSE the la). mask |= 1<<i per good controller.

metadata.verification: Byte-exact 52/52 words vs merged target asm AND vs baserom ROM bytes at USO 0x6BC44; report.json fuzzy=100.0; downstream unit boundaries (0x6BD14, 0x70194) byte-exact after split.
